Subject: Re: Quote for June team dinner — Friday June 12, ~30 ppl

----------------------------------------

Hi Dana — we're planning a 30-person team dinner on Friday June 12, indoor venue. Could you put together a quote? Mediterranean or family-style would be great. Any allergens we should flag — gluten-free, two vegetarians, one nut allergy.
----------------------------------------
From: Dana Kim <dana@bluesprucecatering.example>
At:   2026-04-09T09:30:00+00:00
Hi Casey, happy to help. For 30 people on June 12, our chef's menu (3 mains incl. one veg, 4 sides, salad, bread, dessert) comes to $38 per head. That includes setup, service staff for two hours, and full cleanup. We can absolutely accommodate the GF and nut-allergy guests; vegetarian is built into the base menu. Total ballpark: $1,140 + 18% service. Let me know if you'd like to lock it in. — Dana
----------------------------------------
